title: Epic Fight Bow tweak
description: A simple mod to move the bow out of the way while aiming
body:
NO LONGER REQUIRED ON EPIC FIGHT 2.10 ONWARD

This client-side mod do only one simple thing: Move the bow viewmodel to the right a bit while charging the bow so you can see what you are aiming at

There is also a config file to adjust the offset (efbowtweak.toml)

Check out my other mods:

[Epic Fight x Iron's Spells Animation Fix](https://modrinth.com/mod/epic-fight-x-irons-spells-animation-fix)
